description_long: This is a large, rectangular military-style toolbox constructed from green-painted wooden planks, featuring a weathered and rugged appearance. The lid is reinforced with two parallel wooden slats and displays stenciled black text, including 'U.S. ARMY' and ammunition specifications. Both short ends of the box are equipped with sturdy metal handles and metal latch mechanisms for secure closure and transport. The surface shows signs of wear, with areas of faded paint and exposed wood grain, suggesting heavy use in outdoor or field environments. The box is likely hollow inside, designed to store and transport tools, ammunition, or other equipment. Its robust build and utilitarian design make it suitable for demanding urban or military settings.
description: A large, green, weathered wooden military toolbox with metal handles and latches, marked with 'U.S. ARMY' and ammunition details. The box is rugged, reinforced, and designed for secure storage and transport.
description_view_0: Front view shows the stenciled 'U.S. ARMY' and ammunition markings, with the reinforced lid and two wooden slats clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the metal handle and latch mechanism, as well as the plank construction and visible screws.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain wooden back with faded paint and no visible markings or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing another metal handle and latch, with 'U.S. ARMY' text faintly visible on the lid.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed metal handles on each short end, designed for carrying; robust and utilitarian with no ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Simple metal clasp latches on each short end, likely requiring manual lifting to open; no keyholes or combination locks visible.
attribute_brand_logo: No brand logo; 'U.S. ARMY' text is stenciled on the lid and front.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
attribute_external_labeling: 'U.S. ARMY' stenciled on lid and front
'7500 CRTG 5.56MM' and ammunition details stenciled on front
